CheckTitle: 检查RDS 实例s enforce SSL/TLS 加密 for client connections (Microsoft SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, Aurora PostgreSQL, and Aurora MySQL).
Description: For SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and Aurora PostgreSQL 数据库s, if the `rds.force_ssl` parameter value已设置 to 0, SSL/TLS connections are not enforced. For MySQL, Aurora MySQL, and MariaDB 数据库s, if the `require_secure_transport` parameter value已设置 to OFF, SSL/TLS connections are not enforced. Enforcing SSL/TLS ensures that all client connections to RDS 实例s are 已加密, protecting sensitive information in transit.
Risk: If not enabled, sensitive information in transit is not protected.

Recommendation.Text: 确保instances provisioned with Amazon RDS enforce SSL/TLS for client connections to meet security and compliance requirements.
